name: Jeremy Lee's Soured Cream and Mulberry Jam Pie (Smetannik
recipeInstructions:
1. Find and preheat the oven to a medium heat (300-350°F / 150-180°F).
2. Mix flour with butter and lemon zest.
3. Divide dough into two, refrigerate until cold.
4. Roll out one portion on a cold surface, line flan case, refrigerate.
5. Combine soured cream, pecan nuts in a bowl; scrape vanilla pod seeds in.
6. Add nutmeg, almond extract, cinnamon, and egg yolks to the bowl.
7. Remove lined flan case, spread jam evenly over bottom.
8. Spread pecan and sour cream mixture on top.
9. Place flan side by side, roll out remaining dough portion.
10. Cover with rolled dough, trim edges if necessary.
11. Bake in oven for about 45 minutes until golden brown and slightly puffy.
12. Serve with whipped double cream; enjoy both hot and cold.
